latest_daily.title: Verification, judgement, scarcity, voice — three converging frames in one week
latest_daily.summary: 15 new cards, 2 synthesis patterns, 4 new operators. Today's batch plus a back-audit of past digests (April 26 to May 4) for atomic claims that hadn't yet been ingested.
sources: Backfill audit — past digests April 26 to May 4

recent_daily.title: Research scan v1-v6 — depth-pilot to new-operator workflow
recent_daily.summary: Six research-scan batches ran across the day, ingesting roughly 134 cards, 17 patterns, 4 playbooks, 1 contradiction, and several new operator profiles. The batches followed a depth-first protocol — fewer operators per pass, more substantive cards per operator — and capped with the new-operator workflow that produced the David Ogilvy and Dave Trott profiles.
sources: Research scan v5 — copywriting cluster batch (5 operators)
Research scan v6 — new-operator workflow (David Ogilvy + Dave Trott)

recent_daily.title: Quality pass — 40 shallow cards rewritten with substantive sources
recent_daily.summary: A quality pass on the corpus. 40 shallow cards (mostly podcast-intro paraphrases or weakly-attributed claims) were rewritten with substantive primary-source quotes and stronger mechanism sections. 39 borderline cards were tagged as stubs to come back to. Two specific re-attribution fixes for Sam Mallikarjunan and Sourav Mohanty.

recent_daily.title: Site rebuild + data triage — 181 missing operators added
recent_daily.summary: Phase 1-3 site rebuild (per-view UX redesign, pattern radial converge viz + constellation mobile map, domain pages as mini-anthologies) plus three rounds of layout audit fixes. Three phases of data triage closed gaps the new UI exposed — fixed YAML parser, deduped 3 confirmed duplicates, patched 19 dead URLs and 16 operator externals, restored LinkedIn reactions, and ingested 181 missing operator profiles.

recent_daily.title: Pass C orphan ingestion + Curiosity backfill
recent_daily.summary: A long day of ingestion against the orphan list — operators referenced in earlier passes but with no profile or cards yet. Pass C ran in 6 batches covering 109 orphan operators with substantive insights. Curiosity backfill ran in 8 batches adding external links (LinkedIn, blog, newsletter) for ~200 operator profiles. Plus a launch-ready scrub — 8 stubs removed, 30 URLs validated, 73 cards repaired.

recent_daily.title: Phase 1 — codex foundation built
recent_daily.summary: The day the corpus started. After two months of repository-only existence, the codex was reframed as a cross-domain operator-insight library and the first ~80 cards landed across 30+ ingest commits. Boris Cherny, Simon Willison, Cat Wu, April Dunford, Andy Raskin, Elena Verna, Brian Halligan, Asha Sharma, and many more got their first cards. The watchOS-inspired knowledge graph UI shipped alongside.

recent_daily.title: Repository initialized
recent_daily.summary: Empty repo created. Two months later the codex framing landed and the first cards followed.
